Packaging ✕
01

Data lives in people's heads, not in systems

  • Specifications in PO descriptions.
  • Pricing in someone's memory.
  • Artworks scattered across personal drives.
  • When someone leaves, the knowledge walks out with them.
02

Decisions made without benchmarks

  • Vendor selection based on referrals, not audits.
  • Pricing accepted on trust, not data.
  • Quality defined after disputes, not before production.
  • Packaging decisions made by people without packaging expertise.
03

Processes that don't scale

  • What works for 10 SKUs breaks at 50.
  • What works with 2 vendors collapses at 10.
  • Every new product, every new market adds complexity that manual processes can't absorb.

What happens when packaging procurement
meets digitization and deep expertise.

How it works today
How it should work
NPD
✕Packaging decisions made too late, by people without packaging expertise. Every iteration costs weeks.
✓Packaging strategy embedded from day one. Material recommendations and feasibility analysis before commitment.
Vendor Selection
✕Vendor selection based on referrals and habit.
✓Vendors matched through audited data — compared on equal terms.
Pricing
✕Pricing accepted on trust — no benchmark exists.
✓Cost benchmarks from real production data before you negotiate.
Specifications
✕Specifications in PO descriptions and email threads.
✓Every SKU and spec in one structured, searchable system.
Artwork Mgmt
✕Artworks scattered across drives, inboxes, and WhatsApp.
✓Version-controlled artwork repository linked to every SKU.
Order Tracking
✕Order status requires a phone call to find out.
✓Real-time tracking with milestone alerts and timeline visibility.
Quality Checks
✕Quality defined after the dispute, not before production.
✓Quality parameters agreed and documented before production.
Continuity
✕When someone leaves, the knowledge leaves with them.
✓The system holds the knowledge — not individual people.

Why Reeso

The infrastructure packaging procurement never had.
The expertise it always needed.

01

Production-grounded expertise

Our knowledge comes from years on production floors — not from textbooks or dashboards. Every recommendation accounts for what's actually achievable, what it actually costs, and what vendors actually need to deliver it.

02

Purpose-built systems

Every aspect of our platform - SKUs, Artworks, Specifications, Quality - is designed around how packaging procurement actually works. Not a generic tool repurposed.

03

Deep understanding of the packaging landscape

We understand what brands need and what vendors need to meet those needs. Deep understanding of the ecosystem makes every process smoother and every outcome better.

04

An extension of your team, not a vendor

We don't just fulfil orders. We standardise quality, benchmark costs, manage artworks, support NPD, and provide expert guidance on demand. We function as your packaging department.

About Reeso

We're building the infrastructure that
packaging procurement never had.

0
SKUs Managed
0
Brands Onboarded
0
Audited Vendors
0
Packaging Categories

We started inside the problem.

Before Reeso, we spent four years as packaging vendors — sourcing, manufacturing, and delivering across categories for brands of every size. As both buyers and sellers, we experienced every friction point firsthand: unclear specifications, inconsistent quality, pricing with no benchmarks, and decisions made without data.

That dual perspective showed us something clearly. The same problems repeated across industries, across brands, across vendor relationships. And the root cause was always the same — not the people, but the absence of infrastructure.

We were in a unique position to change that. We'd been the buyer and the seller. We understood the friction points and the interventions needed to solve those frictions. So we built them.

Our Mission

Expertise meets infrastructure.

To give brands a single, comprehensive partner for everything packaging — from vendor discovery to artwork approvals, from quality standardisation to cost benchmarking.

Our Vision

The global standard for packaging procurement.

To become the global standard for how brands source packaging. We are building the infrastructure that will make today's fragmented, manual practices look as outdated as they are.
